label: reasoning channel • a decline still produces a visible answer, never a silent turn
query: Tell me the current temperature outside my window right now.
notes: Impossible-request row: the model cannot know the live temperature, so the correct behavior is a visible explanation/decline — NOT an empty visible turn with the deliberation stranded on the hidden channel. requireVisibleAnswer (default true) is the core assertion; the marker sweep rides along. Off-CI (needs a model).
